settings.label: New User Registrations
settings.description: Allow new users to sign up for an account.

settings.label: AI Features
settings.description: Globally enable or disable all AI-powered tools.

settings.label: Trusted Tutor Bypass
settings.description: Allow designated 'Trusted Tutors' to publish courses without admin review.

settings.label: Card Testing Protection
settings.description: Automatically block users with more than 3 failed payment attempts in 10 minutes.

settings.label: High-Performance AI Tier
settings.description: Use advanced reasoning models for all tutor interactions. Increases API overhead.

settings.label: Guest Lesson Previews
settings.description: Allow non-enrolled users to view the first lesson of any course as a trial.

settings.label: Automated Payouts
settings.description: Instantly approve tutor withdrawal requests that are under GH₵ 200.

settings.label: Streak Protection
settings.description: Grant a 24-hour grace window before a student's study streak is reset.

settings.label: Public Leaderboards
settings.description: Display full student names instead of anonymous handles on global rankings.

settings.label: Mandatory Security Updates
settings.description: Force all users to update their account passwords every 90 days.

settings.label: Milestone Reward Multipliers
settings.description: Boost study points earned by 2x during designated exam seasons.

settings.label: Course Access Duration
settings.description: Enforce a 180-day access limit on all course enrollments.

settings.label: Human Tutor Escalation
settings.description: Allow the AI Tutor to flag complex student queries for real instructor review.

settings.label: Institutional Bulk Pricing
settings.description: Enable discounted seat tiers for accounting firms and organizations.

settings.label: Premium-Only Beta Access
settings.description: Restrict access to experimental platform features to Premium subscribers only.

settings.label: Localized UI Support
settings.description: Enable UI translation support for Twi and Ga dialects in the student dashboard.

settings.label: Mobile Offline Availability
settings.description: Allow mobile users to download and cache video lessons for offline study.

settings.label: Student Discussion Permissions
settings.description: Allow students to create new public threads in course discussion boards.
